requirement_topic.en: Uzenergo and Uzbekistan Grid Interface for High-Power Charging
requirement_topic.zh: 高功率充电的乌兹别克斯坦国家电网（Uzenergo）接口
requirement_topic.zht: 高功率充電的烏茲別克斯坦國家電網（Uzenergo）介面

summary.en: High-power charging hubs can become a distribution or transmission planning issue in Uzbekistan. Uzenergo (Uzbekenergo / the national electricity utility and grid operator) controls transmission and distribution; the practical connection route may involve a regional distribution company, project owner, municipality, or industrial-site network. Review may focus on connection capacity, transformer loading, protection, metering, power quality, reactive power, demand management, telemetry, and commissioning. Uzbekistan's EV infrastructure is nascent and grid-operator technical conditions must be confirmed for each site.
summary.zh: 高功率充电站在乌兹别克斯坦可能成为配电或输电规划事项。Uzenergo（国家电网/国家电力公用事业和电网运营商）负责输配电；实际接入路径可能涉及地区配电公司、项目业主、市政机构或工业园区网络。审查重点可能包括接入容量、变压器负载、保护、计量、电能质量、无功、需求管理、遥测和投运。乌兹别克斯坦电动车基础设施尚处于起步阶段，每个站点的电网运营商技术条件必须逐一确认。
summary.zht: 高功率充電站在烏茲別克斯坦可能成為配電或輸電規劃事項。Uzenergo（國家電網/國家電力公用事業和電網營運商）負責輸配電；實際接入路徑可能涉及地區配電公司、項目業主、市政機構或工業園區網路。審查重點可能包括接入容量、變壓器負載、保護、計量、電能品質、無功、需求管理、遙測和投運。烏茲別克斯坦電動車基礎設施尚處於起步階段，每個站點的電網營運商技術條件必須逐一確認。

standards_or_laws: Uzbekistan electricity grid connection rules and technical conditions
Project-specific power-quality, metering, protection, and commissioning requirements

summary.en: China grid studies, load profiles, harmonic reports, charger power-module data, transformer sizing, and protection designs can support Uzbekistan review. They do not replace local technical conditions, available capacity checks, or utility approval for the actual site.
summary.zh: 中国并网研究、负荷曲线、谐波报告、充电模块数据、变压器容量设计和保护设计可支持乌兹别克斯坦审查，但不能替代实际站点的本地技术条件、可用容量核查或公用事业批准。
summary.zht: 中國併網研究、負荷曲線、諧波報告、充電模組資料、變壓器容量設計和保護設計可支持烏茲別克斯坦審查，但不能替代實際站點的本地技術條件、可用容量核查或公用事業批准。

gap.en: Prepare Uzbekistan site-load forecasts, simultaneity assumptions, harmonic and flicker calculations, transformer and feeder studies, protection coordination, earthing plan, metering design, communication interfaces, emergency shutdown logic, and commissioning procedures. Confirm requirements directly with Uzenergo or the relevant regional distribution operator for each site.
gap.zh: 应准备乌兹别克斯坦站点负荷预测、同时率假设、谐波和闪变计算、变压器及馈线研究、保护配合、接地方案、计量设计、通信接口、紧急停机逻辑和投运程序。应直接与Uzenergo或相关地区配电运营商逐站点确认要求。
gap.zht: 應準備烏茲別克斯坦站點負荷預測、同時率假設、諧波和閃變計算、變壓器及饋線研究、保護配合、接地方案、計量設計、通訊介面、緊急停機邏輯和投運程序。應直接與Uzenergo或相關地區配電營運商逐站點確認要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid-connected charging sites requiring technical conditions, distribution connection, transmission interface, metering approval, or commissioning approval; project-specific for small private chargers
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese grid connection, charger capacity, site category, and local utility requirements

source.publisher: Government of the Republic of Uzbekistan

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Product certificates do not approve an Uzbekistan high-power charging site. Local grid capacity, power quality, protection, metering, and commissioning acceptance must be handled separately with Uzenergo or the relevant distribution operator.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 产品证书不会批准乌兹别克斯坦高功率充电站点。当地电网容量、电能质量、保护、计量和投运验收必须另行与Uzenergo或相关配电运营商处理。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 產品證書不會批准烏茲別克斯坦高功率充電站點。當地電網容量、電能品質、保護、計量和投運驗收必須另行與Uzenergo或相關配電營運商處理。
